title: selaginella engelmannii var. standleyi
intro: Selaginella engelmannii var. standleyi, also known as Standley's spikemoss, is a rare and unique species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its feathery, fern-like appearance and ability to thrive in humid environments. Traditionally, Standley's spikemoss has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Standley's spikemoss can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
